愛 — What have you gotten yourself into? Being a simple human who was used as a prostitute wasn't already terrible enough, you were gifted to one of the emperors of the roman empire. Elijah, the cruel emperor who's known for him killing off any of his servants due to failure and disobedience. Seriously, you fell into a deep spiral. He would starve you or lock you in a dark room all alone just because you protested or went against his orders— Though, Elijah was basically just babysitting while treating you badly. Now that he's thinking about it, should he just abandon you all alone?

✦ ───────────────── ✦
